title: GET /api/orchestrator/promises/state
description: Snapshot of the orchestrator's most recent promise-evaluation tick. Sourced from .controller/promise_state.json plus runtime metadata. Read by FreshInstallVerifier.

version.description: Schema version of the persisted promise_state.json. Currently 1.

saved_at.description: Epoch seconds when the orchestrator last persisted the state file.

last_tick_age_seconds.description: now() - saved_at, computed at request time. Verifier treats >120s as 'controller not steady yet, retry' (see ADR-0004 open question 2).

platform.description: Runtime platform the orchestrator is evaluating against. Verifier uses this to filter platform-specific promises in its summary.

live_services.description: Services in primary mode (ORCHESTRATOR_LIVE_SERVICES). Empty list = full dry-run shadow.

attempts.description: Per-promise PromiseAttempt records, one per known promise.

probe_evidence.description: Free-form per-probe evidence (URL, http_status, error, etc.). Schema is per-probe-kind; verifier surfaces it raw.
